title: Developers & Integrations
body: Zyplo is built with developers in mind.
You can extend Zyplo using APIs and integrations.

title: Zyplo API
body: Use the API to manage projects and tasks programmatically.
Authenticate using API keys or OAuth.
Build internal tools and automations on top of Zyplo.

title: Webhooks
body: Receive real-time updates when things change.
Use webhooks for CI/CD or reporting pipelines.

subsections.title: GitHub Integration
body: Automatically update task status from PRs.
